praise: Massive 6000W output handles high-surge appliances easily
Very quiet operation compared to the original Delta Pro
Battery modules are easier to stack and secure
High solar input capacity (5.6kW) is class-leading
friction: Modular design is bulky and requires significant floor space
Higher entry price point compared to individual PPS units
Heavy to move once battery modules are stacked
Some learning curve for the advanced home integration features
Initial setup requires firmware sync across all modules
delta_summary: Initial launch firmware stabilized stack communication
Improved inverter efficiency at low standby loads
